title: Resolving Merge Conflicts Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Git version control patterns.

questions.question: What is a merge conflict in Git?
options: A data error in a database
A situation where two or more developers modify the same line of code in different branches
A commit that is too large

questions.question: Regarding merge conflicts, which approach is best to follow for resolution?
options: Manually combine the two to create a new, resolved version

questions.question: Which Git command is used to stage a file that has been resolved for a merge conflict?
A situation where two or more transactions are waiting for each other to release a lock, resulting in a hang, is called a _______.
